ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather data entry */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the data was collected */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time of data collection */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the city */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the city */,
  "max_temp" REAL /* Maximum temperature recorded (in Fahrenheit) */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity percentage */,
  "cloudiness" INTEGER /* Cloudiness percentage */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed (in miles per hour) */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the weather station where the data was collected */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version number for the data entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* Two-letter ISO country code */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or region of the city */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  "elevation" INTEGER /* Elevation of the city (in meters) */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the city */,
  "location_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the city's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cities_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("country_code") REFERENCES countries ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_code" TEXT /* Two-letter ISO country code */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the country */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Primary currency used in the country */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken in the country */,
  "iso2_code" TEXT /* Two-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code */,
  "iso3_code" TEXT /* Three-letter ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather parameter (e.g., Max Temp, Humidity) */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., Fahrenheit, Percentage) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the weather parameter */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the parameter (e.g., integer, float) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum value for the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "city_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the city where the station is located */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the weather station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the station */,
  "station_type" TEXT /* Type of weather station (e.g., ground-based, satellite) */,
  "station_status" TEXT /* Status of the station (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_city_id FOREIGN KEY ("city_id") REFERENCES cities ("city_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., sensor, satellite) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of file (e.g., raw data, processed data) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned the permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission (e.g., view_data, edit_data) */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the research team */,
  "team_lead_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team lead */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_team_lead_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_lead_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team member */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "member_role" TEXT /* Role of the team member (e.g., team lead, researcher) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_members_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES research_teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the request was made */,
  "request_description" TEXT /* Description of the requested data */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, fulfilled) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id")
)
